4:00 pm show-Golinsky Comedy Club Benefit Show

Golinsky Comedy Club n December 4, 2015, Dan Golinsky was hit by a reckless driver while on his nightly neighborhood walk, sustaining a traumatic brain injury that took his life eleven months later. His son Evan, then fourteen, founded the Golinsky Comedy Club to honor his father's love of stand-up — and to direct attention and funding toward traumatic brain injuries, a cause too often overlooked.In nearly a decade, the Comedy Club has raised over $120,000 for the Brain Trauma Foundation, Ryder Trauma Center at Jackson Memorial Hospital, and Achieve Miami

6:00 pm show-Sophie Gerson Healthy Youth Benefit Show

Sophie Gerson Healthy Youth Program Family, friends, and colleagues of Sophie Gerson founded Sophie Gerson Healthy Youth in June, 2013. Now, heading into its 10th year, SGHY has positively impacted the lives and futures of so many middle school students.About Our Mission To promote active lifestyles and the physical fitness of young people and to foster the values of good sportspersonship;To advance leadership and life skills through the common language of sports, dance, performing arts, and hands-on science, with special encouragement for girls;Using athletics, the arts, science, sociology and an integrated summer camp program, SGHY helps break the cycle of poverty by creating a sense of achievement, and reduce the incidence of bullying;To help the young adults understand that giving back to the community is a worthwhile endeavor.About Sophie Gerson Healthy Youth
